onComponentTokens.notes: Chevron icon reads against the field bg; defaults to subtle surface text so it follows theme.

notes: Form-text archetype peer of input + textarea: dropdown field with chevron slot and optional label/helper rows.
Three variants: outlined (default, transparent fill + border), filled (tinted fill + border), underline (bottom border only). All ship 15 surface tokens per variant.

Roles brand|danger|warning|info|success|neutral remap via [data-role=...] overriding --brand-* palette vars. Affects focus ring, focus border, focus label colour. Role does NOT override the default border (use aria-invalid for that).
aria-invalid='true' overrides role and applies danger-coloured border across all three variants. Invalid is a STATE, not a role.
Chevron slot ships its own per-density size ladder (--select-chevron-size-*) scaling alongside height and font-size.
